summary: Verified ADR 0106 live on docker-runtime-lv3 by converging the Windmill runtime from the latest origin/main-based worktree, mirroring the Proxmox API token payload into the mounted worker checkout, confirming the enabled `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper_every_30m` schedule, and recording a clean manual reaper sweep receipt for the governed 910-979 ephemeral VM pool.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_ephemeral_vm_reaper.py tests/test_fixture_expiry_reaper.py tests/test_ephemeral_lifecycle_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_deadlock_repo_surfaces.py -q` passed with `21 passed in 0.20s`.
`make syntax-check-windmill` passed from the isolated `codex/ws-0106-live-apply` worktree.

Guest verification on `docker-runtime-lv3` showed `/srv/platform_server/.local/proxmox-api/lv3-automation-primary.json` present with the mirrored `https://proxmox.example.com:8006/api2/json` token payload expected by repo-managed Windmill worker scripts.

The Windmill API reported script `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper` at hash `8c8d5c775f77f716`, and the live schedule list included `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper_every_30m` with `enabled=true`, `schedule="0 */30 * * * *"`, `timezone="Europe/Bucharest"`, and `script_path="f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper"`.

A controller-side `run_wait_result` POST to `http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fephemeral_vm_reaper` returned HTTP 200 with `{"run_at":"2026-03-26T14:33:09.543811Z","warned_vmids":[],"expired_vmids":[],"skipped_vmids":[],"retagged_vmids":[]}`, and `docker-runtime-lv3` wrote matching receipt `/srv/platform_server/receipts/fixtures/reaper-run-20260326T143309Z.json`.

The full `playbooks/windmill.yml` replay from this worktree reached worker checkout sync, runtime secret refresh, stack startup, script sync, and schedule reconciliation. When no-log Windmill tasks failed in the final tail once, the equivalent live API loop successfully replayed every existing repo-managed schedule update, and direct `f/lv3/windmill_healthcheck` plus `f/lv3/ephemeral_vm_reaper` runs both succeeded from the same applied branch state.

notes: The first verified live path depends on the mounted worker checkout, not only the Windmill runtime env contract: sandboxed `run_wait_result` jobs did not reliably inherit the Proxmox API token from `runtime.env`, so the committed fix mirrors the controller-local payload into `/srv/platform_server/.local/proxmox-api/` and the reaper wrappers now prefer that repo-local payload when runtime env injection is absent.

The guest-side `receipts/fixtures/` path had to remain writable for Windmill worker-generated reaper receipts, and the live run recorded here confirms that write path with `reaper-run-20260326T143309Z.json`.
Protected integration files still wait for merge-to-main: `README.md`, `VERSION`, release sections in `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml`.
